response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but lacks direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech contexts, regulatory compliance, or large-scale distributed systems handling financial data. His background leans toward general software development rather than specialized agentic AI or fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Proven track record in building scalable, event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Experience with AI-agent frameworks and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, DevOps automation)
concerns: No explicit experience with regulated fintech environments or financial compliance requirements
Limited exposure to real-time credit risk, liquidity optimization, or trade decisioning systems
Lacks demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams (10 to 30+ people) or hybrid outsourcing models
